title: Backend Developer Vacancy at FarmERP South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at FarmERP South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FarmERP South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About FarmERP South Asia Partners:
FarmERP South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP South Asia Partners!
jsonLd.skills: Go, Kubernetes, SQL, JavaScript, REST APIs, TypeScript, Python, Java
